series_metadata.series_description: The Office Leases are executed leases for all BWC leased office space which includes the Service Offices, William Green Building, and Warehouse locations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 117.49 Record of Land Titles. Retain in Facilities Management for two (2) years after expiration of the lease, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 117.49 Record of Land Titles. Retain on the I: Drive for Facilities Management for two (2) years after expiration of the lease, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
